message:
feat(web): add comprehensive design system with dawn/dusk themes

Implement complete CSS foundation for the Flywheel web UI:

Design tokens:
- Color palette with light (dawn) and dark (dusk) theme support
- Typography using IBM Plex Sans and Space Grotesk
- Consistent spacing, shadows, and border styling

Layout components:
- App shell with sidebar navigation
- Topbar with actions area
- Responsive grid system

UI components:
- Cards with variants (compact, wide)
- Status pills (muted, positive, warning, danger)
- Command palette overlay
- Navigation links with active states
- Primary and icon buttons

Responsive breakpoints:
- Tablet (960px): Condensed sidebar, single column grids
- Mobile (720px): Hidden sidebar, stacked layouts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
